label: Access Point Integration
description: Integrate the system with the network access point infrastructure.

label: Application Logging
description: Implement centralised application-level logging to the SIEM platform.

label: Archer Inventory Update
description: Register and update the asset inventory record in Archer GRC.

label: ArcSight - New Update Alert Request
description: Submit a new or updated alert rule request to the ArcSight SIEM team.

label: Container Native Firewall
description: Configure and enforce container-native firewall policies.

label: Container Security Scan
description: Run automated container image scanning for vulnerabilities and misconfigurations.

label: Cyberark-EPM
description: Enrol endpoints into CyberArk Endpoint Privilege Manager (EPM).

label: DAST
description: Execute dynamic application security testing (DAST) against the running application.

label: Database Logging
description: Enable database-level audit logging forwarded to the central SIEM.

label: File Integrity Monitoring Integration
description: Integrate file integrity monitoring (FIM) for critical system paths.

label: Network Segment & Placement
description: Define and validate the correct network segment and zoning placement.

label: OneTrust Supplier Security Assessment
description: Complete the OneTrust supplier security assessment for third-party vendors.

label: Operating System Logging (Unix)
description: Configure Unix OS-level audit logging forwarded to the central SIEM.

label: Operating System Logging (Windows)
description: Configure Windows OS-level audit logging forwarded to the central SIEM.

label: Penetration Testing
description: Schedule and execute penetration testing before go-live.

label: Privileged user access management/integrations (Cyberark)
description: Integrate privileged accounts with CyberArk PAM.

label: Proxy Definition
description: Define and configure the outbound proxy for the service.

label: Risk Assessment
description: Complete a formal risk assessment covering the system threat model.

label: SAST
description: Run static application security testing (SAST) on the source code.

label: SCS
description: Complete the Supplier Cyber Security questionnaire for vendor involvement.

label: Secure by Design Assessment
description: Conduct the Secure by Design assessment with the security architect.

label: Software Composition Analysis (SCA)
description: Analyse third-party software components for known vulnerabilities (SCA).

label: Vulnerability Scan (Tenable)
description: Run an authenticated vulnerability scan using Tenable.

label: WAF Integration
description: Integrate the web application firewall (WAF) in front of the service.

label: Web Certificate Request
description: Request and configure a valid TLS certificate for the service.
